what_it_does: Acceptance test for the X12 persisted vector index. It builds a vectors/ namespace under an FsStore, embeds addressed corpus items via a swappable embed function, stores {address, vector, content_hash, dim, model}, supports incremental rebuilds keyed by content hash, queries nearest addresses by cosine similarity, degrades with a warning when the embedder is down, and verifies dim guards and persistence across store reloads.
observations: Uses isolated temporary FsStore roots for each test scenario.
Embeds are deterministic 3-D stubs that map known fixture text to fixed vectors.
Build returns metadata: embedded count, skipped count, and a degraded flag.
Query path is expected to reuse existing cosine retrieval logic rather than reimplement it.
Content-hash incremental rebuild avoids endpoint calls when no item changed.
Dim mismatch between query vector and stored vectors is expected to raise ValueError.
Warnings and events are inspected through store.recent_events.
The live-down branch is gated by a real HTTP probe to :8001.
standouts: Live-down assertion is reachability-gated so the suite stays green when :8001 recovers.
Deterministic stub vectors make semantic ranking assertions exact and hermetic.
Explicit degrade-with-warning contract: no fabricated vectors, no crash, honest empty query note.
conventions: Uses a global PASS counter and an inline check helper instead of a test framework.
Sets COMPANY_TEST_RUN and inserts the repo root into sys.path.
Imports from store.fs_store, store.vector_index, and fabric.config.
Fixture corpus mixes code:// and ui:// addresses to prove one address grammar.
concerns: Relies on fabric.config.DEFAULT_EMBED_URL and DEFAULT_EMBED_DIM for the live-down branch without showing their values.
The live reachability probe sends Authorization: Bearer none, which may not match real auth but is only used for a boolean gate.
Assumes vector_index.build_index, index_addresses, get_vector, and query_index exist with the exact shapes used here.
notes: A hermetic acceptance script that proves the X12 vector index works, degrades honestly when :8001 is down, and stays green when :8001 comes back.
questions: What is the exact return contract and event-logging behavior of store.vector_index.build_index?
How does vector_index.query_index delegate cosine computation to nodes/retrieve?
Is the vectors/ namespace created automatically by FsStore or by vector_index?
What content-hash algorithm does vector_index use for incremental comparison?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the docstring frames X12 acceptance proofs for build, incremental refresh, embedder-down, dim guard, and persistence, and the code exercises each proof.
apparent_themes: Address-grammar substrate spanning code:// and ui://.
Hermetic acceptance testing with deterministic stubs.
Reachability-gated live assertions to avoid red-on-recovery.
intention_signals: Establish a persisted vector index that can be refreshed incrementally, degrades safely when the embedder is unavailable, and reuses existing retrieval logic rather than reimplementing ranking.
novelty: The explicit degrade-with-warning contract for an empty or partial index when :8001 is down, combined with a live-down assertion gated by endpoint reachability so the suite does not flip red upon recovery.
contribution: A concrete acceptance specification and test harness for the X12 persisted vector index, including deterministic fixture vectors, content-hash incremental behavior, embedder-down degradation semantics, dim-guard validation, and persistence-survives-reload checks.
summary_for_embedding: Acceptance test for the X12 persisted vector index that verifies build, incremental content-hash refresh, nearest-address query, embedder-down degradation, dim guards, and store reload persistence using deterministic stub embeddings and a reachability-gated live-down check.
intention_for_embedding: Provide a green-now and green-later acceptance proof for the persisted vector index while the real embedder endpoint is down.

symbols.does: Inline assertion helper that increments a global pass counter and prints ok/fail.
symbols.description: Simple test assertion used throughout the script; raises with a descriptive label on failure and tallies PASS for final reporting.

symbols.does: Deterministic stub embedder that returns a fixed 3-D vector for known fixture text.
symbols.description: Simulates an UP embed endpoint without network traffic; maps each fixture sentence to a concept-axis vector so cosine ranking is predictable, and returns an orthogonal default vector for unknown text.

symbols.does: Stub embedder that raises to simulate an unreachable :8001 endpoint.
symbols.description: Used to prove the build path degrades with a warning, writes no vectors, and does not crash when the embed endpoint errors.

symbols.does: Probes the real embed endpoint to decide whether the live-down assertion should run.
symbols.description: Performs a short HTTP probe to fabric.config.DEFAULT_EMBED_URL/models and returns True if reachable, otherwise False, gating the live-down branch so the suite stays green when the endpoint recovers.

symbols.does: Stateful stub embedder that counts how many texts are embedded.
symbols.description: Wraps the deterministic vector lookup while incrementing a counter, enabling assertions that unchanged content triggers zero embed calls and changed content triggers exactly one new embed call.
